title: Enable AMSGrad on warmup-cosine Adam CNN
methodology: Kept the existing 2-conv CNN and time-based linear-warmup-plus-cosine schedule, and changed only the optimizer to Adam with amsgrad=True. No dataset, budget, or evaluation changes were made.
motivation: The brief explicitly suggested optimizer tuning, and this builds directly on exp-020-add-linear-warmup-before-cosine-decay-on, the prior best configuration.
